/usr/bin/ar qc libselfcoin_core.a CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/common/types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/common/network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/common/chain_id.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/common/paths.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/codec/bytes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/codec/varint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/crypto/hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/crypto/ed25519.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/crypto/vrf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/crypto/smt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/keystore/validator_keystore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/genesis/genesis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/genesis/embedded_mainnet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/merkle/merkle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/address/address.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/utxo/tx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/utxo/validate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/utxo/signing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/mempool/mempool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/consensus/monetary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/consensus/state_commitment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/consensus/validators.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/consensus/votes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/storage/db.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/storage/snapshot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/p2p/framing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/p2p/addrman.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/p2p/hardening.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/p2p/messages.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/p2p/peer_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/node/node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/selfcoin_core.dir/src/lightserver/server.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libselfcoin_core.a
